name: Announcement
description: Product launch, event, or news announcement.

variables.name: headline
variables.description: The main announcement — first 210 chars visible before 'see more'. Make it exciting.

variables.name: details
variables.description: Context and background — why this matters

variables.name: features
variables.description: Key features or highlights (use emoji bullets: point, check, cross)

variables.name: cta
variables.description: Call to action. NO links in post body — add link as comment after 15 min.

tips: NO external links in post body — cuts reach by 40%
Add link as first comment after 15-30 minutes
Add an image — posts with images get 2x more comments
Short paragraphs, lots of line breaks for mobile readability
